response.step_by_step_log:
1. Analyzed the video, noting merchandise presentation from 00:00 to 00:34, followed by a song introduction from 00:35 to 00:51.
2. The song "冥界Halloween Night!" by Shirakami Fubuki begins at 00:52.
3. Performed web search using query "冥界Halloween Night 白上フブキ 歌詞" to confirm title and artist and retrieve lyrics.
4. Performed a second search "冥界Halloween Night! lyrics (English Translation)" to find the English translation.
5. Constructed the JSON object with the parsed information.
response.global_summary: A 3D music video performance of "冥界Halloween Night!" by Shirakami Fubuki, preceded by a merchandise introduction and song title announcement.

scenes.description: Introduction of Shirakami Fubuki merchandise including a ribbon charm and full set bonuses.
Announcement screen for the new song "冥界Halloween Night!".
Shirakami Fubuki performs the song "冥界Halloween Night!" in a 3D Halloween-themed setting.

This is Halloween Night!

Just kidding (One)
Bring snacks (Two)

Hide whether you're a living person or a dead person
And...

With a free and easy attitude
Wait, you're lovesick?
No way! That's not it at all!

Dancing! Dancing! A happy melody in the dark night

Swinging! Swinging! A thrilling, pleasant irony
Ra-ta-ta, Ra-ta-ta, The banquet's showtime!
(Pa Pa Pa) How scary
